---
title: "Allison Fairbairn"
---

## Allison Fairbairn

**Dates:** (b.1827)

**Maiden name:** (Callaway)

### Description

of Brambridge House, Twyford

### Biography

She was wife of Sir Thomas Fairbairn, 2nd Bt., of Brambridge House, Twyford, who succeeded his father 1874.

### Letters

- Letter from March 23d 1872

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
